scripts.build: prisma migrate deploy && prisma generate && next build
scripts.perf:lighthouse:mobile: mkdir -p performance-reports && lighthouse http://127.0.0.1:3010 --output=json --output=html --output-path=performance-reports/lighthouse-mobile --chrome-flags='--headless=new --no-sandbox' && node scripts/extract-lighthouse-metrics.mjs performance-reports/lighthouse-mobile.report.json
scripts.perf:lighthouse:desktop: mkdir -p performance-reports && lighthouse http://127.0.0.1:3010 --preset=desktop --output=json --output=html --output-path=performance-reports/lighthouse-desktop --chrome-flags='--headless=new --no-sandbox' && node scripts/extract-lighthouse-metrics.mjs performance-reports/lighthouse-desktop.report.json
